---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the neon experience.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: afifashamsadvivo
---

### 🚨 Describe the glitch
A clear and concise description of what happened while you were pretending to be human.

### 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots (or screen records) of the neon glowing (or failing to glow).

### 💻 Device Info
- OS: [e.g. Android, Windows]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Termux]
- Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

### 📝 Additional context
Add any other notes about the "SECURITY BREACH" here.
